episodes.title: New Epstein Files Raise Allegations Against Donald Trump | FBI Documents Spark Controversy
episodes.description:
Newly released FBI documents related to the Epstein files have sparked controversy in the United States political landscape. According to reports, the documents include allegations involving Donald Trump.

The files reportedly refer to an interview conducted by the Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) in 2019 with a woman who alleged that she had been introduced to Trump by Jeffrey Epstein when she was a minor.

The woman reportedly told investigators that the incident occurred after Epstein brought her to locations in New York City or New Jersey, where she claimed to have met Trump. She also alleged that she later received threatening calls warning her not to speak about the matter.

Meanwhile, members of the Democratic Party have raised concerns over how the investigation into the Epstein files is being handled, alleging that full details have not yet been made public.

Trump has denied all allegations, stating that the claims are false and that he has done nothing wrong.

Watch the video for a detailed explanation of the Epstein files controversy, FBI records, and the political reactions in the United States.
